summary: Read-only final R2 recheck of revised completion docs and direct MCP/pre-response verification code. Inspected requested files and targeted direct-MCP/pre-response evidence. Verdict: AGREE; completion conditions remain adequate and not weakened for direct MCP parity and pre-response proof.
decisions: R2 verdict is AGREE: no blocking objections found.

Direct MCP parity remains hard-gated by real proof artifacts, exact single-name discovery, per-tool successful call evidence, stale-proof rejection, and rejection of hook/config/bootstrap/CLI/synthetic proof sources.

Pre-response proof remains hard-gated by real Codex Desktop live events with context paths, with MCP preflight proof only accepted as fallback evidence for session preflight/context visibility, not as replacement for the live Codex Desktop hook requirement.
Claude absence is accepted only through explicit fresh not_configured proof; Codex must be verified.
search_queries: direct MCP pre-response exact_single_name not_configured verify:goal
